recommendations.title: Wildcat
recommendations.overview: An ex-black ops team reunite to pull off a desperate heist in order to save the life of their leader’s eight-year-old daughter.

recommendations.title: The Marine 5: Battleground
recommendations.overview: While working as an EMT back stateside Jake Carter after responding to a distress call, finds himself caught up protecting a person of interest from a biker gang ruthlessly hunting them down.

recommendations.title: The Marine 6: Close Quarters
recommendations.overview: Jake Carter and another former Marine, Luke Trapper,  join forces to rescue a young kidnapped girl from a gang of international criminals.

recommendations.title: Tower Block
recommendations.overview: A year after witnessing a murder, residents of Tower Block 31 find themselves being picked off by a sniper, pitting those lucky enough to be alive into a battle for survival.

recommendations.title: Green Street 3: Never Back Down
recommendations.overview: An old firm leader returns to Green Street for revenge after receiving a call that his little brother was killed, but is he able to cope with a new type of hooliganism and can he find his killer?

recommendations.title: One Shot
recommendations.overview: An elite squad of Navy SEALs, on a covert mission to transport a prisoner off a CIA black site island prison, are trapped when insurgents attack while trying to rescue the same prisoner.

recommendations.title: Shark Bait
recommendations.overview: A group of friends enjoying a weekend steal a couple of jetskis racing them out to sea, ending up in a horrific head-on collision. They struggle to find a way home with a badly injured friend while from the waters below predators lurk.

recommendations.title: One More Shot
recommendations.overview: Following the attack on the black site in Poland, Navy SEAL Jake Harris is ordered to escort terrorist suspect Amin Mansur to Washington D.C. for interrogation. Before the prisoner transfer process is complete, though, the airport is attacked by a gr

recommendations.title: The Contractor
recommendations.overview: Former CIA Operative James Dial is coaxed back into action to kill a terrorist in London, but it all goes wrong and he is forced into hiding, where he meets and befriends a 12 year old girl.

recommendations.title: See Spot Run
recommendations.overview: A drug sniffing agent canine is a target for an assassin boss so the FBI calls Witness Protection to send him somewhere else. Meanwhile a single Mom puts her 6 year old boy James in the care of her irresponsible, mailman, neighbor, Gordon, when the b
